opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My hands are clamped shut and won't open, I can't feel my lips, and my face keeps twitching on its own. I feel like I can't breathe properly and I'm really frightened.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on over the last several hours and keeps getting worse — the cramping in my hands and feet is agony and I'm home on my own.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 8 hours ago, starting with numbness and tingling around my lips
symptom_narrative.character: the numbness spread and then my hands and feet cramped up and locked into a bent position; my face twitches on its own and I feel like I can't get a proper breath
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst cramping I've ever had — I can't use my hands at all
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: lips and mouth, both hands, feet, and my face
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant and worsening since it started
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it keeps getting worse on its own and the panic makes it feel harder to breathe
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't move my hands or do anything for myself right now

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: had my whole thyroid gland removed 6 months ago because of lumps (a goitre)
past_medical_history.how_managed: on thyroid hormone tablets since the operation

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: told a while back I had early cataracts in both eyes
past_medical_history.how_managed: known but not yet operated on

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: dry, scaly skin and brittle nails for a long time

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; ran out of the calcium and vitamin D tablets 3 days ago and hasn't been able to restock them

objective_data_offered.value: repetitive involuntary twitching of the face; both hands drawn and clamped into a fixed bent position that will not relax
numbness and pins-and-needles around the lips and in the fingers
empty calcium and vitamin D supplement bottles on the kitchen counter
